chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2138 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For Katcha Peshi 24.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt: A.G a/w PI Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, ASI Hassan Ali Abro on behalf of SHO P.S.Tando Yousuf -=-=- This petition is called for hearing, neither petitioner nor his counsel is present. No intimation is received. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 23.9.2015, since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is diligently pursing this petition, therefore, we ourselves have gone through the contents of the memo of this petition according to which main grievance of the petitioner is that official respondents at the behest of private respondents are harassing the petitioner. This fact has been denied by the learned Asstt: A.G in his comments filed on behalf of respondents No.2 & 3 and submits that FIR No.39 of 2015 of police station Tando Yousif registered by the petitioner has been challaned before the concerned court. He further submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to make sure there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in violation of law and they shall act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
